title: Has anyone found a way to 'bulk update' organisation locations in the Location column either through AI or automations?
excerpt: I have a list of about 500 organisations and I want to update the Location of each so I can do analysis based on region. Is there any quick way to get the Location column populated without entering each one manually?

posts.author: Jules3110 (Julia Hodgson)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a list of about 500 organisations and I want to update the Location of each so I can do analysis based on region. Is there any quick way to get the Location column populated without entering each one manually?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: And are you using a text column or location column?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t think there’s an easy way to automate that with Pro (with Enterprise, I was trying to think of some workarounds with the Workflow center).

You might check out make.com, but it honestly might just be easier manually copy/pasting them from elsewhere for this first round.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julie,

If you have the address at hand (in Excel or other importable format), you could use our app Location Importer to convert the textual address (which you can import) into a Location Column.

This will allow you to display it on a Map widget or using our other app Map View Pro.

Best,

Maarten
